name: Courier API
description: The Courier API enables sending notifications across multiple channels (email, SMS, push, chat) to one or more recipients. It provides endpoints for sending messages, managing user profiles, lists, audiences, tenants, bulk jobs, brands, automations, notification templates, and more.
